audience: Trainers, consultants, HR and L&D teams, and Belgian SMEs turning expertise into an online or internal video course
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Uitleggen hoe organisaties een online cursus filmen vanuit leerdoelen, modules, toegankelijke productie, LMS-publicatie, meting en onderhoud

searchIntent.question: How do you film a professional, accessible and maintainable online course?
searchIntent.geographicContext: Belgian organisations and international English-speaking learners

longTailKeywords: publish a course in an LMS
directAnswer: Filming an online course starts with observable learning objectives and a modular pathway, not with the camera. Plan scripts, demonstrations, audio, lighting, accessibility, LMS publication, measurement and updates as one connected system.
title: Filming an online course: from learning objective to a maintainable video programme
metaDescription: Filming an online course? Turn learning objectives into modules and plan scripts, audio, lighting, accessibility, LMS publishing, measurement and updates.
h1: Filming an online course: from learning objective to a maintainable video programme
factsToPreserve: Learning goals and the participant task come before camera choices
The article does not promise that every participant will achieve the learning outcome
A pilot module tests content, production, accessibility, platform and participant task
Captions must be reviewed and a transcript or alternative may also be required
Consent, image rights, copyright and privacy remain part of production planning
Measurement and scheduled maintenance are part of the course lifecycle
